steps.title: Spot the cause and effect
steps.content: The mother wants to ensure her calf's safety (her desire). She releases an infrasonic call (her action). The blank must show why the action follows from the desire.

steps.title: Match the transition to the logic
steps.content:
For this reason directly expresses causality: the mother's desire for safety motivates her action of releasing the call.
The other choices don't fit this causal relationship; they introduce unrelated meanings like illustration, time shift, or parallelism.
B is correct.
